_comment: CLEWs sector color rules for the RES Viewer (Sankey) and simple Mermaid diagram.
Sector legend labels and node colors are generated dynamically from this file — no hardcoding in JS.
Legend labels shown in the diagram (in priority order, only if present in the current model):
Energy      #e67e22  orange   — electricity, fuels, power generation
Water       #2980b9  blue     — water supply, groundwater, irrigation
Land        #27ae60  green    — land use, forest, grassland, plantation
Agriculture #f1c40f  yellow   — crops, food, livestock
Transport   #8e44ad  purple   — mobility, freight, biofuels for transport
Climate     #c0392b  red      — GHG emissions, carbon accounting
Mixed       #795548  brown    — technology with outputs spanning multiple sectors
Unknown     #95a5a6  grey     — technology whose OAR/units/name did not match any rule
Inference order per technology (first match wins):
1. OAR commodity name prefix or description keyword → sector
2. If no OAR match: CapUnitId / ActUnitId → sector
3. If no unit match: technology name prefix → sector
4. Multiple sectors matched → Mixed; nothing matched → Unknown
secondaryFlows: water-balance accounting outputs filtered before matching (would cause false Water hits).
emissionsFlows: emission commodity names filtered before matching (handled by Climate rules instead).
To add a sector or extend matching: add an entry under 'sectors' and update 'sectorPriority'.
To change a color: edit the 'color' field — the legend and node colors update automatically on next load.
